title: Respite Creators [Fabric]
description: Respite Creators is an addon for Farmer's Respite and Create which adds new recipes using Create.
body:
About:

Respite Creators is an addon for Farmer's Respite and Create which adds new recipes using Create. Currently adds new fluids and recipes, which are useful on modpacks.

For the mod to work, it is recommended to install Delightful Creators which combines Farmer's Delight and Create.

Current Content:

• New incomplete food for Sequenced Assembly.

• New fluids for tea, curry, etc.

• Possibility to make tea by mixing ingredients in a mixer.

• Possibility to fill the bottle with tea and coffee.

• Recipes for green tea cookies and nether wart sourdough.

• Recipe for rose hip pie.

Localization:

• English (en_us) - Flomik

• Russian (ru_ru) - Flomik
